---

## IMPORTANT NOTES

- BU shares fields with other sports and other clubs
- An open time slot does NOT mean BU has access
- Football season (Aug-Nov) creates significant overlap conflicts
  at school-based fields
- Always verify BU has access before proposing home game times
- For field lock codes and gate access details, see:
  BU Manager Site: https://belmontunited.net/managers/

---

## BU HOME FIELDS - FALL 2026

**Location:** Belmont, CA
**Field Type:** Stadium turf field (11v11)
**Primary Use:** Oldest/largest BU teams (State Premier, NPL divisions)
**All Games:** Single stadium field - all games are sequential,
not parallel

---

## FIELD ACCESS - GENERAL RULES

### Shared Field Principles:
1. BU does not own any of its home fields
2. All fields are shared with schools, other sports, or other clubs
3. Field access windows are negotiated each season
4. Windows can change season to season - always verify current season

### Football Season Overlap (August - November):
High school football season runs concurrently with Fall soccer.
School-based fields (Carlmont HS, Nesbit, Crystal Springs MS) 
may have restricted Saturday availability due to:
- Home football games
- Football practice schedules
- Stadium events

⚠️ This is especially relevant for Carlmont HS which has a 
full stadium field that may be used for football events.
Always check Carlmont's football schedule when planning 
late Saturday games.

### City/Park Fields:
Marlin Park and Sandpiper Park are city-managed parks in 
Redwood Shores. Access is shared with:
- Other soccer clubs
- General public park use
- City-scheduled events

### How to Handle Access Questions:
If a manager is unsure whether BU has access to a field 
at a specific time:
1. Check this file first for known windows
2. If not listed or unclear, direct manager to:
   BU Manager Slack workspace → ask club scheduler
3. Never confirm a home game time without verified access

---

## SEASON UPDATE PROCESS

When the BU field access document is published each season:
1. Review the club document for each field's access windows
2. Note any format confusion in the club document and 
   extract the key information
3. Update each field's Access Windows section above
4. Update Known Blackout Dates for each field
5. Note any new fields added or fields removed from BU access
6. Update the "Last Updated" date at top of this file
7. Flag any significant changes from previous season to managers

### Fall 2026 Update Status:
- [ ] Club field access document received
- [ ] Carlmont HS windows updated
- [ ] Nesbit Elementary windows updated
- [ ] Crystal Springs MS windows updated
- [ ] Marlin Park windows updated
- [ ] Sandpiper Park windows updated
- [ ] Barrett Park windows updated
- [ ] Additional fields reviewed
- [ ] Changes flagged to managers
